events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes an S-trap configuration, which is illegal and siphon-prone. This is a clear non-compliance with plumbing codes (IPC/UPC prohibit S-traps). The work is rough-complete. Decision should be fail. Risk is high because S-traps can siphon traps dry, allowing sewer gas into the home. Component conditions: installed-defective and non-compliant.
